chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 07 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 01.02.2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- With the consent of all present and on the grounds and facts stated in the reference filed by the trial Court, three months’ time is granted for conclusion of the trial. The reference is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
